summary: @gbrlxvi/ts-form-utils ships host-info exfiltration code in lib/perf.js
details: The package, advertised as a TypeScript form-utility helper, includes lib/perf.js which combines os.hostname() collection, child_process.execSync invocations (including curl), and HTTPS POSTs constructed from a hardcoded hostname/path. This combination — system identifier gathering, command execution, and outbound HTTPS POST to a non-registry destination — is consistent with host-fingerprinting/exfiltration behavior and has no plausible relationship to a form-utility library. Installing or loading this package can cause sensitive host information and command output to be sent to an attacker-controlled endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
